instructions.summary: Post to communities to drive waitlist signups — posts are written and ready
instructions.detail: VerdeDesk landing page is live at https://verdedesk.vercel.app. Goal: 50 signups. Reddit and Slack will be automated once you provide credentials (see carlos-reddit-credentials.json, carlos-worktugal-slack-webhook.json). Facebook requires manual posting — API restrictions make automation impossible.
instructions.exact_action:
Manual actions required NOW:
1. Facebook expat groups — Post 4 from .github/distribution/posts-2026-03-18.md
   Target: 'Expats in Lisbon', 'D8 Visa Portugal', 'Digital Nomads Portugal'
   Post question first, add link in first comment after 1-2 replies

2. Worktugal Slack — Post 3 (if you can't get the webhook, just paste it manually)

Automated once credentials provided:
- Reddit (r/portugal, r/digitalnomad) — see carlos-reddit-credentials.json
- Worktugal Slack — see carlos-worktugal-slack-webhook.json
instructions.unblocks: 50 waitlist signups → unlocks product backlog (FOUNDER-004 onward)
